lake.name: Imja Tsho (Imja Glacial Lake)
lake.notes: One of the most studied dangerous glacial lakes in the Himalayas. Lake lowered 3.4m in 2016 UNDP mitigation project. Growing ~0.03 km2/year.

valley.notes: Parameters estimated from published Khumbu valley surveys. Channel width varies 25-80m along Imja Khola.

villages.name: Dingboche
villages.notes: Nearest major settlement. Junction of Imja and Khumbu valleys.

villages.name: Pangboche
villages.notes: Historic Sherpa village along the Imja Khola.

villages.name: Namche Bazaar
villages.notes: Main trading hub of the Khumbu region. Largest downstream settlement.

villages.name: Lukla
villages.notes: Gateway town with the famous Tenzing-Hillary Airport.
